# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure region for the Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure AD tenant ID."
      }
    },
    "objectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of Azure AD object IDs for applications and service principals that should be able to read and list secrets."
      },
      "defaultValue": []
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "standard"
        },
        "enabledForDeployment": true,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": true,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": true,
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectIds')[0]]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectIds')[1]]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectIds')[2]]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectIds')[3]]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectIds')[4]]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },

            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectIds')[6]]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectIds')[7]]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectIds')[8]]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectIds')[9]]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          }
        ],
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        },
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": 90,
        "enablePurgeProtection": false,
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('vaultName')]"
    },
    "keyVaultResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('vaultName'))]"
    }
  }
